description:
Switch from `company` to `corfu` (+icons +orderless) for code completion.
Corfu uses Emacs's built-in completion APIs, is faster, and integrates
naturally with the vertico/orderless minibuffer stack already in use.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (doom! init block, line ~41)

Change: `company` → `(corfu +icons +orderless)`
title: Replace Company with Corfu
